---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```

```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```

# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
tar_manifest()
tar_manifest(fields = name)$name
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)

```

# Get soil parameters in json format
```{r}
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput)
str(processed_met_data)
processed_met_data$data
df_PCDS_int$pcds_3_emergPlants

df1 <- tar_read(df_dateStageTargetReached)
df2 <- tar_read(df_simNameByCult)

df1<- tar_read(list_observed_clean)
df2<-tar_read(df_stages_Observ)
tar_load(df_final_observed_harv)
tar_load(df_final_observed)
```
